Invite-Only Indicator

NovaPulse™ — The Complete System

Not just signals. NovaPulse™ is a full market analysis toolkit — buy/sell signals, 6+ indicator overlays, AI signal classification (Level 1–4), and a live real-time dashboard. All inside one invite-only TradingView indicator.

⚡
Autopilot Mode
Auto-adjusts sensitivity to live volatility
🎯
TP / SL Auto-Plot
ATR-based TP1, TP2 & SL on every signal
🤖
AI Classification
ML scores every signal quality Level 1–4
📊
Live Dashboard
Trend, volatility, squeeze & sentiment live
🔔
Full Alert Support
Buy, Sell, Exit, Contrarian & Smart Trail alerts
▲ CONFIRMATION SIGNALS — BTC/USDT · 1D · LONG UPTREND
▼ SHORT ENTRY · TP1 · TP2 · STOP LOSS AUTO-PLOTTED
✦ ORANGE "×" EXIT SIGNALS — TAKE PROFIT MARKERS
🟡 TREND TRACER + 💜 NEO CLOUD OVERLAY
📊 LIVE DASHBOARD — REAL-TIME MARKET DATA
🔒 This indicator is Invite-Only on TradingView

To request access, email algovisionx@gmail.com with subject "NovaPulse Access Request". Access is reviewed and granted manually within 24 hours.

The Strategy

One System. Every Market.

📊
Smart Money Concepts (SMC)
Order blocks, BOS/ChoCh detection, liquidity sweeps — read institutional flow before the crowd does.
🎯
Pure Price Action Entries
Zero lagging indicators. Just candle structure, confluence zones and precision reaction levels.
🔔
TradingView Alerts (Invite-Only)
Published script access is invite-only. Get notified the moment a high-probability setup triggers.
📐
Built-in Risk Management
Every signal comes with defined SL, TP1, TP2 and exact position sizing rules. No guesswork.
📈
Multi-Timeframe Analysis
HTF bias + LTF entry confluence. Trade with the trend and never fight the big players.
